keySetup.description: Chan eil an iuchair phrìobhaideach agad air an uidheam seo fhathast. Ion-phortaich cùl-taic fo dhìon facail-fhaire, no cruthaich paidhir iuchraichean ùr (bidh e comasach dhut teachdaireachdan ùra a leughadh bho seo a-mach).

keySetup.imported: Chaidh an iuchair phrìobhaideach a thoirt a-steach dhan uidheam seo. Faodaidh tu seann theachdaireachdan a leughadh a-nis.

auth.headline: Teachdaireachdan tèarainte do dhuine sam bith, àite sam bith
auth.description: Crioptachadh ceann-gu-ceann, eadar-theangachadh gu 100+ cànan, teachdaireachdan a thèid à sealladh, agus gairmean gutha/bhideo.

feature.disappearing: Teachdaireachdan a thèid à sealladh agus dearbhaidhean leughaidh
feature.privacy: Prìobhaideachd an toiseach. An dàta agad, fo do smachd.

hero.line1: Tèarainte messaging airson anyone, anywhere — le
hero.sub: Get a saor tèarainte àireamh fòn gu gairm agus teacsa worldwide over Wi-Fi no dàta. Enjoy crioptachadh ceann-gu-ceann, teachdaireachdan a thèid à sealladh, agus HD voice/video calling — le togte-ann an tools that cuideachadh thu stay connected across borders.
hero.freeNote: Basic calling agus texting tha saor. Advanced AI agus premium features require an àrdaich.

feat.translate: Break cànan barriers ann an agad còmhraidhean

registration.smsConsent: Le creating an cunntas, thu agree gu faigh SMS brathan related gu agad Chatforia activity (such as teachdaireachdan bho other cleachdaichean). Teachdaireachd & dàta rates may apply. Thu faodaidh opt out at uair sam bith ann an Roghainnean.

refund.title: Poileasaidh Ais-phàighidh
refund.intro: At Chatforia, sinn strive gu provide a high-quality service gu uile cleachdaichean. This Ais-phàigheadh Poileasaidh outlines when refunds may be issued.

subscriptions.title: Fo-sgrìobhaidhean
subscriptions.body: Fo-sgrìobhaidhean tha billed ann an advance air a recurring basis. Thu may sguir dheth at uair sam bith through agad roghainnean cunntais no an platform used gu purchase.

eligibility.title: Ion-roghnachd airson ais-phàigheadh
eligibility.body: Refunds may be granted airson duplicate charges, bileachadh errors, no technical issues preventing access gu paid features. Uile requests tha reviewed case-le-case.

nonRefundable.title: Neo-ais-phàighte
nonRefundable.body: Sinn generally do chan eil provide refunds airson unused time, partial fo-sgrìobhadh periods, no failure gu sguir dheth before renewal.

thirdParty.title: Ceannach treas-phàrtaidh
thirdParty.body: If purchased through third-party platforms such as an Apple App Store, refunds must be requested directly through those platforms.

contact.title: Cuir fios
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 30 N Gould Street STE N, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

whyMessaging.title: Why Messaging Platforms Matter Barrachd Than Ever
whyMessaging.intro: Messaging platforms have become one de an most important tools airson communication ann an today’s world. Bho personal còmhraidhean gu business interactions, messaging apps allow people gu stay connected instantly agus efficiently.
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: People rely air messaging apps airson daily communication le caraidean, teaghlach, agus colleagues. Whether it's a quick update no a long còmhradh, messaging provides a convenient agus flexible way gu stay ann an touch.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: One de an main advantages de messaging platforms tha their speed. Teachdaireachdan tha delivered instantly, allowing cleachdaichean gu communicate ann an real time. This level de convenience has made messaging an preferred method de communication airson many people.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Messaging platforms connect people across an globe. Le internet access, cleachdaichean faodaidh communicate regardless de location, making it easier gu build relationships agus collaborate internationally.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Modern messaging platforms focus air giving cleachdaichean control over their dàta agus còmhraidhean. Features like encryption, prìobhaideachd roghainnean, agus teachdaireachd controls allow cleachdaichean gu communicate le confidence.
whyMessaging.futureDesc: Messaging continues gu evolve le ùr features such as AI-powered responses, eadar-theangachadh, agus multimedia sharing. As technology advances, messaging platforms bidh become even barrachd powerful agus versatile.
whyMessaging.outro: Chatforia tha togte le these principles ann an mind, offering a fast, tèarainte, agus user-friendly messaging experience airson a connected world.

global.title: An Future de Cruinneil Communication
global.intro: Communication has evolved rapidly over an past few decades. What once riatanach fòn gairmean no ann an-person meetings faodaidh a-nis be done quickly through messaging platforms. As technology continues gu advance, cruinneil communication tha becoming faster, barrachd accessible, agus barrachd inclusive.
global.barriersDesc: One de an biggest changes ann an communication tha an reduction de geographic barriers. People faodaidh a-nis connect le others across an world ann an near real time. Whether airson personal còmhraidhean, business, no collaboration, messaging platforms have made distance far nas lugha limiting.
global.translationDesc: Cànan has traditionally been one de an biggest obstacles gu cruinneil communication. Today, togte-ann an eadar-theangachadh tools cuideachadh bridge that gap. Platforms like Chatforia allow cleachdaichean gu communicate barrachd easily even if they speak different languages, creating ùr opportunities airson connection agus understanding.
global.realtimeDesc: Speed tha a iuchair factor shaping modern communication. Cleachdaichean expect teachdaireachdan gu be delivered quickly, agus modern infrastructure supports that expectation. Real-time messaging enables barrachd natural agus fluid còmhraidhean.
global.privacyDesc: As communication becomes barrachd digital, prìobhaideachd agus tèarainteachd tha increasingly important. Cleachdaichean want confidence that their còmhraidhean tha protected. Features like encryption agus user-controlled roghainnean cuideachadh taic a barrachd tèarainte communication experience.
global.futureDesc: An future de cruinneil communication bidh likely include barrachd advanced tools, such as AI-assisted messaging, improved eadar-theangachadh, agus enhanced cleachdaiche experiences. As technology evolves, communication bidh lean air adhart gu become barrachd intuitive agus accessible.
global.outro: Platforms like Chatforia tha part de this shift, helping people connect barrachd easily across languages agus borders.

index.title: Blog Chatforia
index.intro: Explore insights air communication, online safety, agus how messaging technology tha connecting people around an world.
index.post3: Carson a tha àrd-ùrlaran teachdaireachd cudromach

howItWorks.title: Mar a dh’obraicheas Chatforia
howItWorks.intro: Chatforia tha designed gu make communication simple, fast, agus accessible. Getting started takes just a few steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Clàraich up using agad post-d no ainm-cleachdaiche gu cruthaich agad Chatforia cunntas.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Connect le others le selecting luchd-conaltraidh no starting ùr chats.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Teachdaireachdan tha delivered quickly gu provide a smooth communication experience.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Built-ann an eadar-theangachadh helps cleachdaichean communicate across different languages.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Stiùirich agad preferences, luchd-conaltraidh, agus communication roghainnean.

safety.title: Sàbhailteachd & Stiùireadh na Coimhearsnachd
safety.intro: Chatforia tha committed gu maintaining a safe agus respectful environment airson uile cleachdaichean. These guidelines cuideachadh ensure a positive experience airson everyone.
safety.respectDesc: Cleachdaichean tha expected gu communicate respectfully. Harassment, abuse, no harmful behavior tha chan eil permitted.

tools.block: Block cleachdaichean gu prevent further interaction

safety.enforcementDesc: Sinn may take action against cunntasan that violate these guidelines, including warnings, restrictions, no permanent removal bho an platform.

profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Cuir air adhart incoming gairmean agus teacsaichean gu agad verified fòn no post-d. Outgoing gairmean/texts faodaidh show agad Chatforia àireamh.

profile.errQuietHours: Quiet uairean must be between 0 agus 23.
profile.ageBandHint: Sinn only store an age range (chan eil agad exact date de birth). This tha used gu keep Air thuaiream Còmhradh pairings reasonable.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Cleachd maidsadh stèidhichte air aois ann an Còmhradh air thuaiream
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: When air, sinn feuch gu pair thu le people ann an compatible age ranges.
profile.partnerAgeBands: Cò leis as urrainn dhut a bhith air do mhaidseadh?
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Teens tha always matched only le other teens. Adults cannot be matched le teens.
profile.teenMatchingNote: Airson safety, cunntasan ann an an 13–17 age range faodaidh only be matched le other 13–17 cunntasan ann an Air thuaiream Còmhradh.
profile.foriaRemember: Let Ria remember things thu tell it
profile.foriaRememberDesc: When this tha air, Foria faodaidh use agad past Air thuaiream Còmhradh còmhraidhean (just le thu) gu keep an còmhradh flowing. Thu faodaidh turn this dheth uair sam bith.

profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: Used when agad claisneachd greeting tha gun fhaighinn.
profile.voicemailGreetingUploaded: Chaidh fàilte post-gutha a luchdadh suas gu soirbheachail
profile.voicemailNote: Voicemails bho agad Chatforia àireamhan bidh be stored ann an agad Post-gutha inbox. Thu faodaidh cuir an comas transcription agus cur air adhart ann an supported planaichean.
profile.portHint: Want gu keep agad làithreach àireamh? Thu faodaidh gluais it into Chatforia Wireless.

port.heading: Gluais an àireamh a th’ agad
port.subheading: Move agad làithreach àireamh fòn bho agad existing giùlanair into Chatforia. Make sure an mion-fhiosrachadh maids agad giùlanair cunntas exactly gu avoid delays.

upgrade.title: Àrdaich
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Tòisich leis a’ phlana shaor againn le taic shanasan. Rach gun shanasan le Plus, no fosgail na feartan slàn le Premium.
upgrade.subtitle: Tagh an app plana, add pasgan dàtas airson yourself, no share dàta le agad teaghlach — uile bho one place.
upgrade.subtitle.app: Tòisich leis a’ phlana shaor againn le taic shanasan. Rach gun shanasan le Plus, no fosgail na feartan slàn le Premium.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Add cruinneil eSIM dàta so Chatforia keeps working even when thu’re away bho Wi-Fi.
upgrade.subtitle.family: Cruthaich a amar dàta co-roinnte airson agad teaghlach agus stiùirich everyone’s usage bho one place.
upgrade.benefitsLine: Fosgail feartan cumhachdach agus thoir sanasan air falbh.

mobile.title: Chatforia Gluasadach (eSIM pasgan dàtas)
mobile.subtitle: Add cruinneil dàta gu keep Chatforia working even without Wi-Fi. Prices automatically adjust based air agad dùthaich agus currency.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Pick a one-time cruinneil pasgan dàta so Chatforia keeps working when thu’re traveling no away bho Wi-Fi.
mobile.note: Sinn don’t sell pasgan dàtas under 3 GB.

features.throttle: Dh’fhaodadh astaran fàs nas slaodaiche às dèidh cleachdadh àrd

disclaimer.devices: eSIM pasgan dàtas require an eSIM-compatible agus unlocked uidheam. Availability varies le fòn model, giùlanair, agus dùthaich. Coverage agus speeds vary le region.

small.title: Starter pasgan
small.desc: Includes 3 GB de high-speed dàta — ideal airson aotrom messaging agus occasional gairmean.
small.bestFor: Short trips, aotrom messaging, agus occasional gairmean

medium.title: Traveler pasgan
medium.desc: Includes 5 GB de high-speed dàta airson trips, commuting, agus regular VoIP gairmean.
medium.bestFor: Weekend trips, regular VoIP gairmean, agus maps

large.title: Power pasgan
large.desc: Includes 10 GB de high-speed dàta airson heavy còmhradh, gairmean, agus bhideo air an Chatforia network.
large.bestFor: Heavy còmhradh, gairmean, bhideo, agus hotspot use
large.aria: Buy Power cleachdaiche eSIM pasgan dàta

compare.title: Compare eSIM pasgan dàtas
compare.disclaimer: Actual dàta usage depends air how thu use Chatforia (voice, bhideo, media, agus other apps air agad fòn).

family.title: Chatforia Teaghlach (co-roinnte dàta)
family.subtitle: Share a single dàta pool across agad teaghlach. One bill, multiple Chatforia cunntasan, cruinneil coverage.

small.title: Teaghlach Beag
small.desc: Includes 20 GB de co-roinnte high-speed dàta — great airson 2–3 aotrom cleachdaichean.

medium.title: Teaghlach Meadhanach
medium.desc: Includes 40 GB de co-roinnte high-speed dàta — ideal airson 3–5 active buill.

large.title: Teaghlach Mòr
large.desc: Includes 80 GB de co-roinnte high-speed dàta — airson power families that tha always online.

feature.shared: Co-roinnte dàta pool airson agad teaghlach
feature.members: Thoir cuireadh up gu 4 additional buill
feature.topUp: Add barrachd pasganan uair sam bith
feature.fairUse: Subject gu fair-use poileasaidh agus ionadail limits

family.disclaimer: Teaghlach pasganan cruthaich no top up a amar dàta co-roinnte. Thu faodaidh thoir cuireadh agus remove buill uair sam bith.
family.footnote: Teaghlach pasganan share a single dàta pool across linked Chatforia cunntasan. Availability agus limits depend air agad dùthaich agus ionadail regulations.

why.title: Why people switch gu Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia gives thu a real àireamh fòn, glic eadar-theangachadh, agus a clear path gu go ad-free when thu’re ready.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Lighter sanasan air Saor, a simple Plus àrdaich when thu’re ready, agus Premium tools TextNow doesn’t offer.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Modern app, cruinneil-first design, agus togte-ann an eadar-theangachadh instead de seann-school gairm cur air adhart.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs còmhradh apps
messengers.body: Teacsa real àireamh fòns — chan eil just other app cleachdaichean — le AI agus inbhe togte ann an. Great if thu’re coming bho apps like TextFree no TextMe.

why.tableTitle: Mar a tha Chatforia a’ dèanamh coimeas
why.disclaimer: Comparison based air publicly ri fhaighinn information agus may atharraich over time. Other free-texting apps like TextFree no TextMe tha generally similar gu TextNow.

free.q: A bheil an plana saor really saor?
free.a: Tha. An plana saor includes a Chatforia àireamh, calling, agus messaging le sanasan. Thu faodaidh stay air Saor as long as thu like, no àrdaich gu remove sanasan agus unlock barrachd features.

plusPremium.q: What’s an difference between Plus agus Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus removes sanasan agus extends agad teachdaireachd history — perfect airson everyday use. Premium adds extra customization, AI tools airson rewrites agus replies, agus priority taic airson heavy cleachdaichean.

esim.q: Where do eSIM pasgan dàtas work?
esim.a: Chatforia Gluasadach uses cruinneil eSIM coverage. Availability depends air agad dùthaich agus uidheam. Thu’ll see supported options during activation inside an app.

cancel.q: Faodaidh I sguir dheth no atharraich planaichean uair sam bith?
cancel.a: Tha. Thu faodaidh stiùirich no sguir dheth agad fo-sgrìobhadh bho an bileachadh page ann an an app. Changes take effect at an end de agad ùine bileachaidh làithreach.

family.a: Teaghlach pasganan cruthaich a amar dàta co-roinnte across multiple Chatforia cunntasan. One person pays an bill, agus thu faodaidh thoir cuireadh no remove buill agus set limits per person.

gettingStarted.title: A’ tòiseachadh
gettingStarted.subtitle: Ùr gu Chatforia? This quick tòisich shows an essentials so thu faodaidh be productive ann an minutes.

alert.text: This guide bidh grow as sinn launch ùr features. If something’s missing, let us know via

section2.title: 2) Tòisich messaging

section2.item3: Feuch teachdaireachdan a thèid à sealladh agus dearbhaidhean leughaidh ann an Pròifil → Prìobhaideachd.

section3.title: 3) Rach nas fhaide
section3.item1: Thu faodaidh àrdaich gu a paid plana uair sam bith inside an app.
section3.item2: Once thu’re signed ann an, thu faodaidh link additional uidheaman agus set up crioptaichte backups bho Roghainnean ann an an app.

account.q: Ciamar a chruthaicheas no a gheibh mi air ais mo chunntas?
account.a: Luchdaich a-nuas an app no use web, tap “Cruthaich cunntas”, verify agad post-d/phone. Gu recover, use “Forgot facal-faire”.

privacy.q: A bheil teachdaireachdan air an crioptachadh ceann-gu-ceann?
privacy.a: Tha. Teachdaireachdan agus gairmean tha end-gu-end crioptaichte le default. Only thu agus an recipient faodaidh leugh them.

translate.q: Ciamar a dh’obraicheas eadar-theangachadh sa bhad?
translate.a: Cuir an comas “Auto-translate” ann an Roghainnean → Appearance & Cànan. Sinn eadar-theangaich on-device where supported, otherwise through tèarainte APIs le minimal metadata.

contact.a: Reach us at support@chatforia.com. Include screenshots agus agad app version.

contact.title: Cuir fios thugainn

contact.errorSend: Cha b’ urrainn dhuinn cuir. Feuch post-d support@chatforia.com.

intro.body: This Prìobhaideachd Poileasaidh explains how Chatforia (“sinn”, “us”) collects, uses, agus shares information when thu use againn apps agus services. Sinn design Chatforia gu minimize an dàta sinn faodaidh access.

infoWeCollect.title: Information sinn collect
infoWeCollect.account: Cunntas info (e.g., post-d/phone) gu cruthaich agus tèarainte agad cunntas.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Crioptaichte content (teachdaireachdan/calls) tha end-gu-end crioptaichte; sinn faodaidh’t leugh it.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/usage like crash logs, uidheam type, no coarse analytics gu improve performance.

sms.title: Gluasadach àireamh fòns agus SMS
sms.body: If thu tagh gu provide a gluasadach àireamh fòn, sinn use it gu cuir an comas features such as cunntas verification, logadh a-steach rabhaidhean, agus user-gu-user messaging via SMS where supported. Sinn may cuir transactional SMS teachdaireachdan related gu agad cunntas agus activity air Chatforia. Thu faodaidh opt out de receiving SMS teachdaireachdan at uair sam bith le replying le a supported opt-out keyword (such as “STOP”) no le changing agad notification preferences ann an an app. Sinn do chan eil sell agad àireamh fòn no use it airson unrelated marketing.
sms.addRecipient: Cuir neach-faighinn gu h-àrd gus tòiseachadh…

howWeUse.title: How sinn use information
howWeUse.provide: Provide agus tèarainte an service (auth, spam/abuse detection).

sharing.title: Co-roinneadh
sharing.body: Sinn don’t sell personal dàta. Sinn may share limited dàta le processors (e.g., push brathan, analytics) under strict contracts.

rights.title: Do rights
rights.body: Depending air agad region (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), thu may request access, correction, deletion, no opt-out de certain processing. Neach-conaltraidh: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Dàta retention & tèarainteachd
retention.body: Sinn retain only what’s needed gu operate an service agus apply industry-standard tèarainteachd. E2E content faodaidh’t be decrypted le us.

children.title: Clann
children.body: Chatforia isn’t directed gu children under 13 (no as riatanach le agad ionadail law).

changes.title: Atharrachaidhean
changes.body: Sinn’ll post updates here agus revise an “Last updated” date.

contact.title: Cuir fios
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: Le using Chatforia thu agree gu these Teirmean. If thu do chan eil agree, don’t use an service.

accounts.title: Cunntasan
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Provide accurate info agus keep credentials tèarainte.
accounts.itemResponsibility: Thu’re responsible airson activity air agad cunntas.

acceptableUse.title: Cleachdadh iomchaidh
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Chan eil illegal, abusive, no infringing content; chan eil spam no automated abuse.

sms.title: Conaltradh SMS
sms.body: If thu provide a gluasadach àireamh fòn, thu agree that Chatforia may cuir thu SMS teachdaireachdan related gu agad cunntas agus use de an service, such as logadh a-steach rabhaidhean, tèarainteachd brathan, agus teachdaireachdan related gu còmhraidhean thu initiate no participate ann an. Sinn do chan eil use SMS airson promotional no marketing teachdaireachdan without agad explicit consent. Standard teachdaireachd agus dàta rates may apply. Thu faodaidh opt out de SMS teachdaireachdan at uair sam bith le replying le a supported opt-out keyword (airson example, “STOP”) no le updating agad notification roghainnean ann an an app.

yourContent.title: Do content
yourContent.body: Thu retain rights gu agad content. Thu grant us necessary rights gu operate an service (e.g., routing, storage, eadar-theangachadh).

disclaimer.title: Àicheadh-dleastanais & buailteachd
disclaimer.body: Service tha provided “as tha” without warranties. Gu an fullest extent permitted le law, Chatforia isn’t liable airson indirect no consequential damages.

changes.title: Atharrachaidhean
changes.body: Sinn may update these teirmean; continued use after changes means acceptance.

contact.title: Cuir fios
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Do Chan eil Sell no Share Mo Personal Information
doNotSell.body: Chatforia does chan eil sell personal information. California residents faodaidh still submit requests under CPRA using an button below.

cookies.title: Cookie Roghainnean
cookies.body: Chatforia uses minimal cookies (e.g., session, tèarainteachd). Sinn don’t use third-party sanasan cookies. Stiùirich cookies via agad browser’s roghainnean.

press.title: Na meadhanan
press.contactLine: Airson media inquiries, reach us at
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia tha a privacy-first messaging app that makes cross-language còmhradh effortless. Teachdaireachdan tha end-gu-end crioptaichte le default, agus togte-ann an eadar-theangachadh supports 100+ languages ann an real time. Cleachdaichean faodaidh cuir an comas teachdaireachdan a thèid à sealladh, keep dearbhaidhean leughaidh roghainneil, agus sync across uidheaman. Ri fhaighinn air iOS, Android, agus an web.
press.scanTip: Air desktop? Scan le agad fòn gu get an app.
press.appStore: Luchdaich a-nuas air an App Store

careers.title: Dreuchdan
careers.intro: Sinn’re a beag founding team building Chatforia — a prìobhaideach, cruinneil messenger launching air web, iOS, agus Android. If thu care mu dheidhinn prìobhaideachd, encryption, agus delightful cleachdaiche experiences, sinn’d love gu hear bho thu.
careers.openRoles: Fosgail founding roles: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Gluasadach Engineer (iOS), Gluasadach Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Tèarainteachd & Encryption Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: How gu apply: Use an button below gu post-d agad resume agus links.
careers.whyBullets:
• Cuideachadh build an foundation de a ùr cruinneil messenger.
• Ship improvements used across web, iOS, agus Android.
• Work directly le an founder air architecture agus product direction.
• Own high-impact areas de an stack: messaging, voice, bhideo, encryption, telecom, AI.
• Join at an beginning — before an cleachdaiche base scales.

about.title: Mu Chatforia
about.description: Chatforia tha a tèarainte, multilingual messenger le crioptachadh ceann-gu-ceann, sa bhad eadar-theangachadh, agus voice/video calling. Ar mission tha simple: cuideachadh people connect—safely, privately, agus across languages.

values.control: Control: Teachdaireachdan a thèid à sealladh & dearbhaidhean leughaidh tha roghainneil.
values.control_aria: Control: Teachdaireachdan a thèid à sealladh agus dearbhaidhean leughaidh tha roghainneil.

about.howDescription: Teachdaireachdan tha crioptaichte air agad uidheam before they leave it. Eadar-theangachadh, backups, agus uidheam sync tha designed gu minimize what againn servers faodaidh see.

advertise.title: Advertise le Chatforia

phoneNumberManager.noFreeNumbersAreaCode: Chan eil saor àireamhan ann an againn pool airson that area code an-dràsta.

aiSettings.title: AI Roghainnean
aiSettings.controlIntro: Control eadar-theangachadh, glic replies, agus ForiaBot auto-responses.

accessibilitySettings.title: Accessibility & Rabhaidhean
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Options gu make Chatforia easier gu use without relying air sound.
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: Starts at normal size. Increase if thu prefer larger teacsa.
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Show banners agus title blink so thu don’t miss activity.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Brief bright flash when a gairm rings.
accessibilitySettings.enableLiveCaptions: Cuir an comas live captions during gairmean (Premium)
accessibilitySettings.liveCaptionsDesc: Show real-time captions bho an other participant’s claisneachd.
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotesDesc: Attach a transcript gu claisneachd teachdaireachdan thu faigh.
accessibilitySettings.changesSavedInstantly: Changes tha air a shàbhaladh instantly.

privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: Store only ciphertext air an server. Disables AI/Translate agus moderation previews.
privacySection.strictE2EEEnabled: Strict E2EE air a chomasachadh. AI/Translate bidh be à comas.
privacySection.strictE2EEDisabled: Strict E2EE à comas. AI/Translate re-enabled.
